description: This lecture discusses slashing in proof of stake protocols, including its mechanics and implications. It contrasts slashing with proof of work protocols and highlights the challenges of implementing slashing through hard forks.
topic_summary: The video covers slashing in proof of stake protocols, explaining its purpose and mechanics [t=69.66], the need for a cool down period [t=87.94], and the challenges of implementing slashing through hard forks [t=164.16]. It emphasizes the differences between proof of stake and proof of work in terms of fund confiscation [t=313.19].
